testcase.name: Fluxo de Autenticação - App Paciente › Login › deve fazer login com credenciais válidas

failure.message: auth-flow.spec.ts:111:9 deve fazer login com credenciais válidas

testcase.failure:

testcase.failure:
[mobile] › auth-flow.spec.ts:119:9 › Fluxo de Autenticação - App Paciente › Login › deve mostrar erro com credenciais inválidas

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: Mobile visual checks › protected tabs redirect to login when unauthenticated

failure.message: mobile-views.spec.ts:42:7 protected tabs redirect to login when unauthenticated

testcase.failure:
[mobile] › mobile-views.spec.ts:42:7 › Mobile visual checks › protected tabs redirect to login when unauthenticated
Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed
Expected pattern: /\/(auth)\/login/ Received string: "http://127.0.0.1:19006/exercises" Timeout: 5000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 5000ms 9 × unexpected value "http://127.0.0.1:19006/exercises"
43 | await page.goto('/(tabs)/exercises'); 44 | > 45 | await expect(page).toHaveURL(/\/(auth)\/login/); | ^ 46 | 47 | await page.goto('/(tabs)/appointments'); 48 | await expect(page).toHaveURL(/\/(auth)\/login/); at /home/rafael/Documents/fisioflow/fisioflow-51658291/patient-app/e2e/mobile-views.spec.ts:45:24
